home.title: The Platform for Entrepreneurs
home.description:
Network, incubators, resources, investment.
The all-in-one entrepreneurial ecosystem.
home.toolsDesignedForEntrepreneurs: Tools Designed for Entrepreneurs, by Entrepreneurs
home.toolsDesignedForEntrepreneursDescription: Explore our tailored features to connect, grow, and succeed.
home.socialNetworkDescription: Share your entrepreneurial journey and connect with a vibrant community. Discover the first social network designed exclusively for entrepreneurs.
home.communityDescription: Expand your network and connect with the right profiles: mentors, business angels, and C-level executives. Onefive helps you find the partners to elevate your project.
home.discussionDescription: Share your thoughts, ask questions, and get feedback from the community. Connect with like-minded entrepreneurs facing similar challenges.
home.dataroomDescription: Securely share your confidential documents with investors and stakeholders. Organize your fundraising process and track engagement with powerful analytics.
home.spotlightDescription: Discover incubators, accelerators, competitions, and other resources to power your startup. Onefive brings everything together for you.
home.methodologyDescription: Avoid costly mistakes with exclusive resources: pitch templates, financial plans, and case studies. From ideation to scaling, Onefive has you covered.
home.investmentDescription: Invest in tomorrow's startups or raise funds for your own. Onefive democratizes access to startup investments.
home.ecosystem: The ecosystem that brings everything an entrepreneur needs in one place
home.ecosystemDescription: We created Onefive to simplify your entrepreneurial journey: inspiring encounters, connected tools, and an engaged community to accelerate your growth
home.futureOfEntrepreneurshipStartsHere: The future of entrepreneurship starts here
home.joinMoreThan4000Founders: Join <animated>count</animated>+ founders already growing with Onefive.
home.theFutureOfEntrepreneurshipStartsHere: The future of entrepreneurship starts here
home.meetInvestorsGetTailoredMentorshipConnec: Meet investors, get tailored mentorship, connect with industry experts—all on one platform built for European entrepreneurs
home.onefiveConnectsWithTheBestStartupPlatfor: Onefive connects with the best startup platforms
home.seamlesslyIntegrateWithTopPlatformsToEnh: Seamlessly integrate with top platforms to enhance your startup experience.

pricing.title: Build your success without financial barriers
pricing.subtitle: We believe innovation shouldn't be hindered by costs. That's why Onefive is currently free for all visionary entrepreneurs.
pricing.freeLimitedTime: Free for a limited time during our launch phase
pricing.everythingToGetStarted: Everything you need to get started

freeFeatures.0: Full access to all platform features

enterpriseFeatures.1: Full API access and custom integrations

faq.a1: For now, Onefive is completely free. In the future, we plan to introduce paid plans with advanced features, while maintaining a generous free tier to support entrepreneurs at the beginning of their journey.
faq.q2: When will paid plans be launched?
faq.a2: We're currently focused on building a strong community and improving our platform. Paid plans are expected to launch in the coming months. Users on our waitlist will be the first to know and receive special offers.
faq.q3: Can I use Onefive for my business?
faq.a3: Absolutely! Onefive is designed to support entrepreneurs and startups at all stages of development. Our platform is suitable for solo entrepreneurs as well as established teams and companies.
faq.a4: Currently, Onefive is in private beta. You can join our waitlist to be among the first to access it. Invitations are gradually sent to members on the waitlist.
